name: pnp-list-formatting-spotify-now-playing
title: Spotify Now Playing
shortDescription: Transforms list items into Spotify-style 'now playing' cards with album-art block, status row, track / artist / album, a horizontal progress bar with elapsed and total time, and play / like controls.
longDescription: This SharePoint JSON view formatting sample transforms list items into Spotify-style 'now playing' cards. Each item shows an album-art block, a status row with a coloured dot, the track title, artist, and album, a horizontal progress bar with elapsed and total time, and a play / like control row. Colours and icons are column-driven so each item can be styled independently. The play button opens the configured track URL in a new tab, and the heart icon toggles like / unlike directly on the list item via a setValue customRowAction.

references.name: Use view formatting to customize SharePoint
references.description: You can use view formatting to customize how items in SharePoint lists and libraries are displayed. To do this, you construct a JSON object that describes the elements that are displayed when an item is loaded in a view and any styles to be applied to those elements.
